title: Rule (GSM v1)
description: Behavioral constraint: how the system acts over time via mechanisms, sensors, and effectors. First imperative level in the PPRC chain.

triggeringReceptor.description: Receptor whose received events trigger the rule.

applicabilityConditions.description: LogicalExpression that must evaluate to true for the rule to be applied.

iterationConditions.description: LogicalExpression that, if true, causes re-application of the rule.

controlSequence.description: Ordered references to Control primitives defining effectors when the rule is applied.
